label: Atelectasis
definition: Partial or complete collapse of lung tissue.
caveats: Labels mined from reports; often noisy and ambiguous.
limitations: Predictions are probabilistic and not diagnostic.

label: Cardiomegaly
caveats: Dataset does not distinguish acute vs chronic cases.

label: Effusion
definition: Fluid accumulation in the pleural space.
limitations: Chest X-ray alone cannot determine etiology.

label: Infiltration
caveats: Highly noisy label; overlaps with Pneumonia.

label: Mass
definition: Large abnormal growth in the lung.
caveats: Labels may not specify benign vs malignant.
limitations: Requires biopsy or CT for confirmation.

label: Nodule
definition: Small rounded opacity in the lung.
caveats: Label noise common; nodules <1cm often missed.

label: Pneumothorax
definition: Air in the pleural space causing lung collapse.

label: Consolidation
definition: Region of lung filled with liquid instead of air.
limitations: Etiology cannot be determined by X-ray alone.

label: Emphysema
definition: Chronic lung disease with alveolar destruction.
limitations: CT is more sensitive than X-ray.

label: Pleural Thickening
limitations: Etiology cannot be inferred from X-ray.

label: Hernia
definition: Protrusion of abdominal contents into thoracic cavity.
caveats: Rare label; few examples in dataset.
